top_signals.title: Bonds Retreat, Oil Jumps After US Strikes on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil prices climbed while bonds fell across most of Asia as renewed Middle East tensions sparked fears of energy supply disruptions, complicating the outlook for inflation and interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iranian Oil at Sea Left in Limbo After US Revokes 60-Day Waiver
top_signals.summary: Tens of millions of barrels of Iranian oil already on tankers have been left in limbo after the US walked back a waiver allowing the Islamic Republic to sell the crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Microsoft to enable Windows settings backup by default for orgs
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says the Windows settings backup and restore tool will be enabled by default on Microsoft Entra-joined or Microsoft Entra hybrid-joined enterprise systems after upgrading to Windows 11 26H2. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: SEC crypto rule changes are high on its 2026 agenda
top_signals.summary: The financial regulator’s agenda included proposed rule changes related to crypto broker-dealers, digital assets on national securities exchanges and potential safe harbors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Debate: Should Britain set up a No 10 North?
top_signals.summary: Is Andy Burnham's vision for a Number 10 North visionary or gimmicky? We hear both sides in this week's Debate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: O’Brien can complete July Cup Mission
top_signals.summary: MASTER trainer Aidan O’Brien is on the brink of yet another record, as a win in Saturday’s July Cup (4.35pm) would make him the leading trainer in the famous sprint. He is currently tied with his forebear at Ballydoyle, the legendary Vincent O’Brien as well as Charles Morton, who trained five July Cup winners between [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Muchova downs Osaka to set up Gauff semi
top_signals.summary: The evenly-matched ​pair had a 3-3 head-to-head record coming into the tie and both produced ‌high quality ‌tennis despite sizzling temperatures on Court One.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
